description_long: This is a realistic bronze bust sculpture of an older man with a mustache and short hair, mounted on a rectangular stone or concrete base. The facial features are finely detailed, with deep-set eyes, pronounced cheekbones, and a furrowed brow, giving the figure a contemplative expression. The surface of the bust has a dark, weathered patina, typical of outdoor bronze sculptures, and subtle textural variations that suggest careful craftsmanship. The ears, nose, and mouth are proportionate and naturalistic, while the back of the head is smooth and rounded. The base is solid and slightly rough, contrasting with the smoother finish of the bust itself. This type of sculpture is commonly found in public parks, plazas, or near civic buildings as a commemorative monument.
description: A detailed bronze bust of an older man with a mustache, mounted on a rectangular stone base, featuring realistic facial features and a dark patina.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the man's face, mustache, and detailed expression with the bust mounted on a rectangular base.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the ear, nose, and the side contour of the face and head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, rounded back of the head and both ears, with the base clearly visible.
description_view_3: Right profile view showing the opposite side of the face, ear, and the base.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture could be placed in an outdoor urban plaza, park, or near a public building.
